description: You are an academic advisor creating a visual prerequisite map for a new 'AI & Robotics' specialization using the curriculum data found in `~/Desktop/curriculum_data.csv`. Create a diagram named `ai_curriculum_map.drawio` in the `~/Diagrams/` folder that organizes the courses into horizontal swimlanes by Academic Year (Years 1-4). Each course from the CSV must be represented by a node labeled with its Course Code and Name, with directed arrows showing all prerequisite dependencies. Apply distinct color coding to the course nodes based on their 'Type' (Core, Math/GenEd, or AI/Specialization). Export the completed diagram as a PDF to `~/Diagrams/ai_curriculum_map.pdf`.
